content: Safari on iPhone does not support beforeinstallprompt. The install prompt is a manual banner in App.tsx that checks: isSafari + isIOS + !isStandalone + !localStorage('safari-hint-dismissed'). Dismissal is persisted. Push notifications are also unsupported in Safari PWA as of 2026 — all AI digest delivery must be pull-based.

name: offline-round-tracking
description: Zustand roundStore is persisted to localStorage via persist middleware (name: 'caddie-active-round'). Online/offline detection via window addEventListener('offline'/'online') → setOffline(). Supabase flush only happens when connectivity is restored and user taps Finish Round. The offline badge in RoundActive header reads from isOffline in the store.
